summary: iOS 👀 Free60+/20 | Image missing on Home Screen
scenario: Headset image missing from Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen when pairing Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20
description_clean: Headset image is missing from the Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen when pairing Poly Voyager Free 60+ or Poly Voyager Free 20. No placeholder image is displayed on the test build, while two placeholder images appear side by side on the production app. Expected: The headset image should display on the Home Screen.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure no Poly device is currently connected.
Put the Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Poly Voyager Free 20) into pairing mode.
On the app Home Screen, observe the area where the headset image should appear.
expected: The headset image for the Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Poly Voyager Free 20) should display on the Home Screen.
actual: The headset image is missing from the Home Screen. No placeholder image is displayed on the test build, while two placeholder images appear side by side on the production app.
